examples.complaint_text: Last year [DATE] I closed my mortgage, payment fixed [REDACTED], This year [DATE] The mortgage company sent me a message tell me my mortgage payment going to be [REDACTED], When I call they said the company who does my escrow did it wrong so I have to pay the difference. is that something? I have been struggling to pay my mortgage never missed a payment now they add almost {$600.00} on top of my regular payment. People who that they profession, make they mistake I shouldn't be the one who paying for they mistake, weeks before we get to the close document passed on to many hands before closing no one seeing it. I think they try to kick me out so they can get advantage on me

examples.complaint_text: I am to formally express my concerns regarding Zelles handling of disputes, particularly in light of the recent CFPB lawsuit highlighting significant issues with the platform. Despite using Zelle numerous times and reporting discrepancies, my financial institution and Zelle failed to investigate my claims adequately. They informed me that recovering lost funds was impossible and that tracking these transactions was unfeasible. The CFPBs findings indicate that Zelle has not only neglected to protect consumers but has also allowed repeat offenders to exploit the system, leaving user vulnerable to scams. The lack of accountability and transparency is unacceptable and raises serious concerns about consumers safety.

examples.complaint_text: Hello, I purchased a car after my bankruptcy from a dealership in [REDACTED] maryland and the finance guy did everything he could to get me a loan through santander. My interest was very high and I needed a car to go to work so I got the car back in [DATE]. While I was working I paid my monthly payments for two years almost and lost my job on [DATE]. The car was {$32000.00} I paid {$5000.00} down payment which I had at the time. I tried finding other jobs and I had several jobs I worked since then. Still paid my car note even though I was struggling with it. Finally I lost my job again and havent been able to make payments from [DATE] until [DATE] which the car was repossessed through santander. I would like to know if I have any rights due to santander applying my loan back in [REDACTED] even though I was a high risk customer just coming out of a bankruptcy. The car was repod on [DATE] and stander would not let me pay the missed payments saying I have to pay the whole amount which is now {$20000.00} after making payments of {$560.00} for two years. Most of the monthly payments of course went into interest only and a little amount to principal. Thanks

examples.complaint_text: I've sent multiple letters to this agency about this not being my account. After being advised by identitytheft.gov, I've completed and sent a fraud affidavit via certified mail. I can see they received it, but nothing has changed. See supporting documents. Even the USPS tracking. My official complaint is against ENHANCED RECOVERY. My information was used to obtain an apartment, cell phone, and an auto loan with my ex-partner. I am a victim of identity theft and have put this off for too long. I've completed the proper steps, 1. notify creditors 2. police report 3. informed the state of Texas. The individual I've suspected for this theft is now deceased, and the police department said to contact the federal trade commission to seek relief. These companies disregard laws and dont care whos credit or lives they impact.

examples.complaint_text: Upon pulling my credit report I noticed Toyota Financial Services listed which is inaccurate. I requested the debt to be investigated on [DATE] and received a prompt response on [DATE] only stating " we have researched our records and have determined that the information is correct '' with no proof of the debt. On [DATE], I sent another letter to requesting more information on how this was researched with no response. On [DATE], I sent another request for the information never received from my [DATE] request with no response again. At this point this inaccurate debt should be removed from my report immediately as this has been a hardship on myself and my family. Please assist. Thank you!

examples.complaint_text: USAA has decided to do away with their MasterCards, which is their prerogative, but what they have done is taken the liberty to issue Visa credit cards to all of its MasterCard customers without their authorization. I now have a Visa card from USAA on my credit report that I never wanted or authorized. If this were a store card, such as a [REDACTED] [REDACTED] card, being created without my authorization, nobody would question that it would be considered fraud. How is this any different? The email I received last week was the first I knew of the change coming. The email said the MasterCard would remain open until [REDACTED] [REDACTED]. However, they have already performed a balance transfer from the MasterCard to the new unauthorized unwanted Visa card. I logged in over the weekend to pay off my MasterCard balance in full as I do every month, but all but {$24.00} had been moved to the unauthorized Visa card. Transferring money more than a month in advance of the MasterCard being closed without my authorization appears to be more fraudulent actions on USAA 's part. I called USAA and asked that the transfer balance be transfered back to my MasterCard and I would pay off the balance in full, but they said they could n't.

examples.complaint_text: I terminated my account with [REDACTED] XX/XX/2021. I paid off phones and then changed carriers. I then was provided [REDACTED] shipping labels by [REDACTED] for two signal boosters and one warranty issued phone. I sent back the three items with the shipping labels provided. All tracking numbers sow that the equipment was received by [REDACTED] and signed off by a [REDACTED] employee when it was received. Despite this fact and my providing these tracking numbers to [REDACTED] they continued to try to collect the debt which was not owed in the amount of {$690.00}. After 10 plus calls and 15 hours on the phone with off shore [REDACTED] employees I could never get them to admit they received the equipment and that their employees either lost or stole the items. I was told that they were opening an investigation or that they were escalating it to a manger. Nothing ever changed. They then sent my account to a collections agency by the name of Amsher Collection Services. I disputed the claim with Amsher Collection Services but they said that [REDACTED] verified the account. An Amsher Representative told me that as long as I paid something like installments on the debt that it would not be reported to my credit. Come to find out that they lied and it was reported to my credit. This was not a valid debt and the proof provided to both [REDACTED] an Amsher clearly show this is not a true debt. The both received the copies of the [REDACTED] tracking numbers that show the equipment was received. They are both in violation of state and federal law for attempting to collect an invalid debt, threatening credit reporting and misinformation. They have destroyed my credit by reporting a false debt.

I need it removed from my credit file ASAP.

examples.complaint_text: JP Morgan Chase took over First Republic Bank. They are now converting my old accounts with First Republic Bank to JP Morgan Chase. They have set the default account type and fee structure on all of my accounts to the highest fee option available to them even though my accounts do not qualify. I called multiple times. I mostly got robots. Once I did reach someone one they told me the decision was based on " many factors '' but they could not tell me what factors. I believe JP Morgan Chase is doing this intentionally to trick all transferred accounts to incur unjustified fees. They sent multiple packages ( [REDACTED] ) of pages of information that is dense, confusing and incomplete. I carefully reviewed all pages and I can not find out why they have chosen to set all of my accounts to the highest fee option possible even though none of my accounts qualify. This is a scam!

examples.complaint_text: This is a [REDACTED] home internet account that was paid in full when the service was canceled. The equipment was returned. I do not owe anything on this account. I have attempted to contact both the original creditor, [REDACTED] [REDACTED] and the collection agency, Amsher Collection Services . Amsher does not have any information about why [REDACTED] claims there is a {$280.00} balance, and [REDACTED] will not send me any documentation or accept payment unless I complete an " identity verification '' process that requires visiting a [REDACTED] store. However, I am unable to complete [REDACTED] 's " identity verification '' process because [REDACTED] stores are unable to assist with home internet accounts that were opened online, as mine was.
